!
hostname R2
!
interface Ethernet1
   no switchport
   ip address 10.0.12.2/30
   ip ospf area 0.0.0.0
   ip ospf cost 10
!
interface Ethernet2
   no switchport
   ip address 10.0.23.2/30
   ip ospf area 0.0.0.0
!
router bgp 65002
   router-id 2.2.2.2
   neighbor 10.0.12.1 remote-as 65001
   neighbor 10.0.23.3 remote-as 65003
   !
   address-family ipv4
      neighbor 10.0.12.1 activate
      neighbor 10.0.23.3 activate
!
router ospf 1
   router-id 2.2.2.2
   network 10.0.0.0/8 area 0.0.0.0
!
end
